entries.title: Agent-Friendly Web
entries.description: Jan Wilmake's mission to make the open internet accessible to AI agents through token-dense URL mirrors

entries.title: Jan Wilmake
entries.description: Dutch software developer, entrepreneur, and AI researcher based in Groningen

entries.title: ActionSchema
entries.description: AI-powered spreadsheet and data-pipeline tool developed by Jan Wilmake

entries.title: ContextArea
entries.description: Web-based context engineering and MCP client tool by Jan Wilmake; launched February 2026

entries.title: forgithub
entries.description: Family of GitHub-focused tools by Jan Wilmake including Dashboard for GitHub and Context for GitHub

entries.title: Grok Thyself
entries.description: X data sync tool by Jan Wilmake that continuously backs up tweets, bookmarks, and likes to a private GitHub repo

entries.title: LLMTEXT
entries.description: Open-source toolkit by Jan Wilmake for creating, validating, and using llms.txt files; launched under Parallel AI in October 2025

entries.title: Markdown Browser
entries.description: Browser extension and web tool by Jan Wilmake showing any URL's markdown representation alongside its llms.txt sidebar

entries.title: openapisearch.com
entries.description: API discovery and search tool by Jan Wilmake that went viral in March 2025

entries.title: Self-Driving Repos
entries.description: Jan Wilmake's platform for running autonomous AI agents on GitHub repositories with strict budget control

entries.title: SimplerAuth
entries.description: Auth library collection for Cloudflare Workers by Jan Wilmake; minimal OAuth implementations

entries.title: sponsorflare
entries.description: Cloudflare Workers-based sponsorship and usage-billing layer built by Jan Wilmake

entries.title: uithub
entries.description: GitHub repository viewer and AI context tool developed by Jan Wilmake
